channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Blanche says federal agents need local support to address Chicago violence
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche stated on Monday that federal agents alone cannot solve violent crime issues like those in Chicago.

item.title: New York Times Marks Father's Day With 'Bearded Women Can Replace Dads' Editorial
item.description: The 'trans dad' cartoon op-ed highlights mainstream media's disregard for traditional fatherhood and reality.

item.title: Don't Hold Section 702 Renewal Hostage to the SAVE America Act
item.description: There is a distinction between strategic leverage and a poison pill that destroys that leverage.

item.title: Alito and Thomas Criticize SCOTUS for Not Enforcing 'Colorblind' Constitution in Police Cases
item.description: The justices argued that the Constitution is color-blind and rarely allows racial distinctions by government actors.
